entry.data:
PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 35 MPH, BECOMING WEST 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH THIS AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING NORTHEAST AFTER MIDNIGHT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHEAST 10 TO 15 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE AFTERNOON
BREEZY WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 45 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

RAIN SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN A CHANCE OF SNOW SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LIGHT SNOW ACCUMULATION
BREEZY AND MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 20S
CHANCE OF PRECIPITATION 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY SUNNY
BLUSTERY AND MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 30S

MOSTLY CLEAR
COLD WITH LOWS AROUND 15

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 30S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 20S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 50S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
